# st-alicloud_kvstore_instance_bandwidth_burst (Resource)

Manages elastic bandwidth burst for an Alibaba Cloud Redis (R-Kvstore) instance. Bandwidth burst is an instance-level setting — when enabled, the instance can burst beyond its baseline bandwidth when traffic spikes.

~> **Note** This resource is only available for pay-as-you-go Redis instances. Each write operation (create/update/delete) takes approximately 1–2 minutes because the instance transitions to `Changing` status during the API call. The provider automatically waits for the instance to return to `Normal` before completing.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "st-alicloud_kvstore_instance_bandwidth_burst" "default" {
  instance_id = "r-xxxxx"
  enabled     = true
}
```

## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String) The ID of the Redis instance.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether to enable bandwidth burst. Set to `true` to enable, `false` to disable.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Same as `instance_id`.

## Import

This resource can be imported using the `instance_id`:

```shell
terraform import st-alicloud_kvstore_instance_bandwidth_burst.default r-xxxxx
```
